purpose: Safe public URL smoke targets for production-lock evidence. These targets do not fetch private data and do not imply production readiness.

targets.name: Canonical app custom domain root
notes: Required because the canonical public/demo app has a documented custom domain.
Passing this target is URL reachability only, not production launch proof.

targets.name: Canonical app Firebase root
notes: Required Firebase host smoke for the canonical public/demo app.

targets.name: Canonical system status route
notes: Optional until a new deployment proves the /system route is live.

targets.name: Staging proving ground root
notes: Optional in production smoke because staging cannot be production truth.

targets.name: Privacy custom domain root
notes: Optional URL proof only; workflow/legal/privacy gates remain unproven.

targets.name: Jobs Firebase root
notes: Optional URL proof only; strict production evidence is incomplete.

targets.name: Admin Firebase root
notes: Optional and expected to warn until admin live route proof exists.

targets.name: Asset Factory apex domain root
notes: Optional deferred-system smoke; user-derived artifact privacy and provider gates remain missing.

targets.name: Foundation apex domain root
notes: Optional external governance-surface URL proof only.
